name: cosmo
description: A Pulumi package for creating and managing WunderGraph Cosmo resources.
attribution: This Pulumi package is based on the [`cosmo` Terraform Provider](https://github.com/wundergraph/terraform-provider-cosmo).

nodejs.packageDescription: A Pulumi package for creating and managing WunderGraph Cosmo resources.
nodejs.readme:
> This provider is a derived work of the [Terraform Provider](https://github.com/wundergraph/terraform-provider-cosmo)
> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`pulumi-cosmo` repo](https://github.com/wundergraph/pulumi-cosmo/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-cosmo` repo](https://github.com/wundergraph/terraform-provider-cosmo/issues).

> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`pulumi-cosmo` repo](https://github.com/wundergraph/pulumi-cosmo/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-cosmo` repo](https://github.com/wundergraph/terraform-provider-cosmo/issues).

apiKey.description: The Api Key to be used: Leave blank to use the COSMO_API_KEY environment variable

apiUrl.description: The Api Url to be used: Leave blank to use: https://cosmo-cp.wundergraph.com or use the COSMO_API_URL environment variable

provider.description:
The provider type for the cosmo package. By default, resources use package-wide configuration
settings, however an explicit `Provider` instance may be created and passed during resource
construction to achieve fine-grained programmatic control over provider settings. See the
[documentation](https://www.pulumi.com/docs/reference/programming-model/#providers) for more information.

apiKey.description: The Api Key to be used: Leave blank to use the COSMO_API_KEY environment variable

stateInputs.description: Input properties used for looking up and filtering Contract resources.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the feature flag was created.

createdBy.description: The user who created the feature flag.

featureSubgraphs.description:
The list of feature subgraphs associated with the feature flag. 
At least one feature subgraph must be provided.

isEnabled.description: Indicates whether the feature flag is enabled.

labels.description:
The labels associated with the feature flag. These labels indicate which 
federated graphs can be associated with the feature flag to enabled calls against the corresponding feature subgraph.

name.description: The name of the feature flag.

namespace.description: The namespace of the feature flag.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the feature flag was last updated.
